character_continuity: Tiny friendly robot baker with expressive eyes, small metal body, chef hat, and gentle helpful personality.
setting_continuity: Warm cozy bakery with golden morning light, flour, copper pans, wood counters, and family-friendly charm.

scenes.story_beat: A tiny robot prepares a cozy bakery before sunrise.
scenes.visual: A tiny friendly robot baker polishes a mixing bowl in a warm cozy bakery before sunrise, flour bags and copper pans around it.
scenes.style_notes: warm cinematic 3D animation, soft golden light, charming family friendly tone, consistent tiny robot character, no text, no logos
scenes.voiceover: Before sunrise, a tiny robot baker wanted to make the perfect cake.

scenes.story_beat: The robot tries to do everything alone.
scenes.visual: The tiny robot carefully stacks ingredients, spins a whisk, and tries to manage too many baking tasks at once.
scenes.style_notes: warm cinematic 3D animation, playful tension, consistent robot design, no text, no logos
scenes.voiceover: It measured, mixed, and rushed, certain it could do everything alone.

scenes.story_beat: A small baking mishap creates a mess.
scenes.visual: A puff of flour bursts into the air as the tiny robot watches a wobbly cake tilt on the counter.
scenes.style_notes: funny but gentle, warm cinematic 3D animation, expressive robot eyes, no text, no logos
scenes.voiceover: Then one little wobble turned the whole bakery cloudy with flour.

scenes.story_beat: The baker helps and teamwork saves the cake.
scenes.visual: A kind human baker kneels beside the tiny robot, and together they decorate the cake with simple frosting swirls.
scenes.style_notes: cooperative, kind, warm cinematic 3D animation, consistent robot character, no text, no logos
scenes.voiceover: But with one helpful hand, the robot learned that teamwork made the cake better.

scenes.story_beat: The customer loves the charming imperfect cake.
scenes.visual: The tiny robot and baker present a charming slightly imperfect cake to a smiling customer in the glowing bakery.
scenes.style_notes: happy ending, cozy warm 3D animation, gentle glow, consistent robot character, no text, no logos
scenes.voiceover: The cake was not perfect, but everyone agreed it was made with heart.
